inst_welcome_text_1:
Welcome to this experiment. 
 
 Please read the following instructions carefully.
inst_text_ver_1: In the next screen, you will see two dots jumping up and down
inst_text_hor_1: Now they will jump from left to right.
inst_text_amb_1: If they jump at different times, you can see either up-down or left-right motion.
inst_text_mml_1: In the next screen, the distance of the dots will vary over time.
inst_text_mml_2: If the spacing is very narrow at first, you will likely see left-right motion at first and up-down motion later.
inst_text_mml_3: If the spacing is very wide at first, you will likely see up-down motion at first and left-right motion later.
inst_text_mml_4: Next, please press SPACE as soon as you notice a change in the direction of movement.
inst_text_mml_5:
There are now a few trials with changing distances. 
 
 Please press SPACE as soon as you notice a change in the direction of movement.
exp_text_1: Some more instructions for the main experiment:
exp_text_2: You will now see an entire row of the jumping dots.
exp_text_3: You might notice how they all do the same thing - either all go up-down or all go left-right
exp_text_4: The first few jumps can determine how you see the dots moving for a certain time.
exp_text_5: If all dots jump up and down a few times before they start jumping separately, it can influence how you see them move.
exp_text_6: In the next screen you will likely see all dots move up and down for a while.
exp_text_7: Now you will likely see them move from left to right.
exp_text_8: At some point, the direction might switch spontaneously.
exp_text_9: From now, on focus on the center of the screen and try to keep your gaze on the fixation cross.
exp_text_10:
Please pay attention which direction the dots are jumping. 
 
 Whenever you notice a change in the direction of motion press SPACE.
exp_text_11:
Note: Initially, the dots may all jump up and down or from left to right for a short period. Afterwards they change to the alternating state. 
 
 Please do NOT respond to this change! 
 
 You should only respond if you perceive a change in the direction of motion during the later, alternating state!
exp_text_12: Press SPACE only when you notice a change in the direction of motion.
exp_text_13: When you are ready, press SPACE to start.
exp_break_text_1:
Time for a short break. 
 Press space to continue when you are ready.
exp_complete_text:
Thank you for participating! 
 Please press SPACE to finish and inform the experimenter about the completion.
